baseline.meaning: The FULL keep-set {a,b,c,d,e} = arm P. This is the greedy start context and is NOT re-run — it is the confirm2 arm-P baseline, referenced here.
baseline.source_result: confirm2 arm-P 3/3 all http anchors pass (verdict success, unique.executed 2255 >= 1500, workdir==root, build source physical); sag_git_sha 428fcb1, target_repo_sha 4f86ca6a5eb528613edb892a4f7161e23dce15d7, seed 42, cache warm, arch arm64.

baseline_reds.note: Full-suite gate (analyzer-diet.md:536-555): the SIX pre-existing SUITE failures registered at launch; any NEW suite failure BLOCKS. Suite reds, NOT probes. Matched by node-id keyword up to max_count; an accepted red that spreads to a new call site (count overflow) is a NEW regression.

code_under_test_note: The EXECUTION worktree (.worktrees/category3-stage2) is created at 428fcb1 EXPLICITLY — the confirm2 code-under-test SHA whose run pins carry sag_git_sha=428fcb1 (see logs/panel-confirm2-tvm-http/*/run-pin.json). It is NOT repo HEAD and NOT any campaign pin; new runner commits on the branch do NOT move it. scripts/run_category3_stage2.py resolves --pinned-sha 428fcb1 and passes it to run_category3_panel.create_clean_worktree.

dimensions.mapping_note: Five 0/1 chars in PRESCRIPTION_FLAG_NAMES order (src/sag/config/prescriptions.py); 1=retained (prescription on), 0=removed. Elimination scans a->e.

greedy_rule.candidate: remove ONE currently-retained dim at a time -> candidate mask; run httpcomponents-client x3 reps at stage S2-<bits> via the collector run-probe.
greedy_rule.deletion_rule: 3/3-all-anchors: a dim is DELETED iff all 3 reps pass ALL pre-registered http anchors (panel_category3_evaluator.evaluate_probe('httpcomponents-client', ...)). Any rep failing any anchor keeps the dim.
greedy_rule.method: fixed-point greedy backward elimination over dims a..e (order a->e)
greedy_rule.rescan: rescan-to-fixed-point: after every successful deletion RESCAN the remaining retained dims from a; stop when a full pass deletes nothing -> the retained set is the (locally minimal) keep-set.
greedy_rule.stage_naming: S2-<5bits> (e.g. S2-01111). The collector derives the canonical treatment mask from the S2- stage name (_stage_treatment_mask); the runner ALSO passes the matching <bits> to --prescriptions so the collector bit-by-bit agreement check fires and a disagreement raises before archiving.
greedy_rule.worst_case_run_budget: 45 candidate runs. At most 5 dims are deleted; each deletion triggers a rescan. The candidate count is bounded by 5+4+3+2+1 = 15 candidate masks across the passes, x3 reps = 45 runs. The baseline 11111 is NOT counted (referenced, not re-run).

ledger_note: campaign-ledger.jsonl carries: one baseline-red row (the six accepted suite reds registered at launch; any NEW suite failure BLOCKS); a run row per archived rep (kind=run, run_key httpcomponents-client-S2-<bits>-r<rep>, with per-file sha256 checksums identical to run_category3_panel.execute_run); and one s2-decision row per candidate {parent_mask, tested_dim, candidate_mask, reps[3], decision}. Idempotent/resumable: a ledgered rep is re-evaluated from its archived artifacts, never re-run.

httpcomponents-client.note: VERBATIM from confirm2 (logs/panel-confirm2-tvm-http/panel-lock.json) and bit-for-bit identical to scripts/panel_category3_evaluator.py evaluate_httpcomponents (_is_execution_bearing). historical 1,856 / confirm2 2,255; the 16-test mis-scope must be impossible.
httpcomponents-client.test_phase_workdir_is_root: EXECUTION-BEARING test invocations ONLY: every build(action=test) invocation that ACTUALLY RAN a command (non-empty recorded command, or a success) has working_directory == project root (from the control record clone/analyze event, never derived from the invocations) AND at least one execution-bearing root test invocation exists. A REJECTED ATTEMPT (empty recorded command with a non-success outcome) is NOT a test execution and is excluded.

purpose: Pre-registered Stage-2 ablation for httpcomponents-client. Stage-1/confirm sealed http as P-pass and F-fail (confirm2 logs/panel-confirm2-tvm-http: P 3/3 all-anchors, F-r2 a real regression), so per the three-outcome rule the probe enters Stage 2 to find the LOCALLY MINIMAL keep-set of prescription dimensions. This lock is pre-registered and committed BEFORE launch (pre-registration discipline); the anchors and greedy rule are frozen here BEFORE this campaign sees any Stage-2 data.
run_pin_note: seed 42, dependency_cache warm, arch arm64, models per each run-pin.json (gpt-5.4-mini in confirm2). run_order_index is LIVE and numbered 0..N-1 over the Stage-2 total order (its own sequence, monotonic across every candidate rep); the collector verifies its presence on each new live run and refuses to archive a dropped index. The runner stamps each fresh rep index into the s2-decision ledger row.

supersedes.note: Continues from confirm2 (logs/panel-confirm2-tvm-http), which sealed http as P-pass and F-fail -> Stage 2. tvm/bigtop/pyyaml already have DELETE votes; this Stage-2 finds the http keep-set only.
